case_title: CACH LLC VS. JENNIFER B. HAGAN et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT JENNIFER HAGAN'S AMENDED MOTION TO QUASH SUMMONS IS OFF CALENDAR BECAUSE THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 2.6B, THE COURT NEEDS TO HAVE A COURTESY COPIES OF THE PAPERS FILED IN SUPPORT OF THE MOTION, THIS MOTION IS NOT SCANNED ON THE COURT'S COMPUTER. ON NOVEMBER 21, 2013, THE COURT TOOK OFF CALENDAR A SIMILAR MOTION BECAUSE THE MOVING PARTY DID NOT COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

OPPOSITION TO MTN TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JENNIFER HAGAN'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 4, 2013 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 3, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT JENNIFER HAGAN'S AMENDED MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS IS OFF CALENDAR. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION AS REQUIRED BY LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND THE COURT'S MINUTE ORDER ISSUED ON OCTOBER 3, 2013. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $57.30 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT HAGAN, JENNIFER B.

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Amended Mtn And Amended Mtn To Quash Summons
Off Calendar Dec-19-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JENNIFER HAGAN'S Amended Motion To Quash Summons is off calendar because the moving party failed to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Pursuant to Local Rule 2.6B, the Court needs to have a courtesy copies of the papers filed in support of the motion, This motion is not scanned on the Court's computer. On November 21, 2013, the Court took off calendar a similar motion because the moving party did not comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

AMENDED MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant JENNIFER HAGAN'S AMENDED MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS IS Off calendar. Moving party failed to provide courtesy copies of the Notice of Motion and Motion as required by Local Rule 2.6B and the Court's minute order issued on October 3, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Nov-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT JENNIFER HAGAN's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is continued to November 21, 2013, per the amended notice of motion. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Oct-03-2013 Continued To Nov-04-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT JENNIFER HAGAN's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is
Continued to November 4, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 3, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. The Court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
